summary: Comprehensive testing of GMScreen refactoring, grouped sidebar tabs, extracted tab components, and MapMaker polish features. All 16 tabs render correctly with grouped categories.

CombatTab component (Combat Control, encounter selector, initiative tracker)
MapMaker with Templates (Tavern, Dungeon, Forest, Coastline)
Story Arcs, AI Planner, Soundboard tabs

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 Live Play Mode tabs are working correctly. The grouped sidebar with COMBAT/WORLD/CHARACTERS/REFERENCE/SESSION categories is functional. MapMaker has been polished with Templates (Tavern, Dungeon, Forest, Coastline), Fill tool, Undo, Export/Import. The extracted tab components (CombatTab, NpcsTab, PartyTab, NotesTab, MonstersTab) render correctly with their respective content.
